title: L5: Own Game Project
description: Plan and build your own original Scratch game that meets the assessment criteria.

steps.title: Project Introduction
steps.content:
Make your own game

Over the next three lessons you will build your own original Scratch game. It must meet all of the criteria below to get full marks.

CriterionMarksWhat is needed
Background2A background that fits the theme
Sprites4At least one sprite that changes costume (animates)
Controls4A sprite controlled by arrow keys
Scoring6Score that increases and decreases

16 marks total. Do a quick plan first — then start building!

steps.title: Quick Plan
steps.content:
Quick plan

Answer these four questions before you start building. Keep it short — one sentence each is fine.
steps.js:
(function(){var c=document.getElementById('qp-form');c.innerHTML='
';document.getElementById('qp-go').onclick=function(){var v=[document.getElementById('qp-n'),document.getElementById('qp-p'),document.getElementById('qp-u'),document.getElementById('qp-d')].map(function(el){return el.value.trim();});var ok=v.filter(function(x){return x.length>2;}).length;var fb=document.getElementById('qp-fb');if(ok===4){fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Plan saved — start building!';__markStepComplete();}else{fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='Please answer all four questions before moving on.';}};}())

steps.title: Build Your Game
steps.content:
Build your game

Build your game below. Check against the criteria as you go:

  • Background that fits the theme (2 marks)
  • At least one sprite that changes costume (4 marks)
  • Sprite controlled by arrow keys (4 marks)
  • Score that goes up AND down (6 marks)

Reminder: score up and score down

change [score v] by (1)
change [score v] by (-1)
  • change by (1) makes the score go up.
  • change by (-1) makes the score go down.
steps.js: (function(){var NW=1100,NH=650;function sf(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(!f)return;var w=f.parentElement,bar=w.querySelector('.y7-check-bar'),bH=bar?bar.offsetHeight:44,fs=w.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'),aW=fs?window.innerWidth:w.clientWidth,sc=fs?Math.min(aW/NW,(window.innerHeight-bH)/NH):aW/NW;f.style.width=NW+'px';f.style.height=NH+'px';f.style.transform='scale('+sc+')';f.style.marginBottom=Math.round(NH*(sc-1))+'px';f.style.marginLeft=fs?Math.max(0,Math.round((aW-NW*sc)/2))+'px':'0';}function tfs(){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame'),w=f.parentElement,btn=document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn'),isF=w.classList.toggle('y7-fullscreen');btn.textContent=isF?'✕':'⛶';btn.title=isF?'Exit full screen (Esc)':'Full screen';if(isF){window._y7sy=window.scrollY;document.body.style.overflow='hidden';}else{document.body.style.overflow='';window.scrollTo(0,window._y7sy||0);}sf();}sf();if(window._y7r)window.removeEventListener('resize',window._y7r);window._y7r=sf;window.addEventListener('resize',window._y7r);if(window._y7k)document.removeEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);window._y7k=function(e){if(e.key==='Escape'){var f=document.getElementById('y7-scratch-frame');if(f&&f.parentElement.classList.contains('y7-fullscreen'))tfs();}};document.addEventListener('keydown',window._y7k);document.getElementById('y7-fs-btn').onclick=tfs;document.getElementById('y7-check-btn').onclick=function(){runStepRuntimeTest({kind:'keyMoves',key:'ArrowRight',axis:'x',direction:'positive'},'✓ Arrow key controls working!','Arrow key not moving the sprite — check the forever loop has an if right arrow pressed block with change x by (5) nested inside.');};}())

steps.title: Peer Assessment
steps.content:
Peer assessment

Swap computers with a partner and play their game. Complete the checklist below honestly.
steps.js:
(function(){var cr=[{c:'Has a background that fits the theme',m:2},{c:'Sprite changes costume (animates)',m:4},{c:'Arrow key controls work',m:4},{c:'Score increases when collecting',m:3},{c:'Score decreases when caught',m:3}];var c=document.getElementById('peer-assess');c.innerHTML=''+cr.map(function(x,i){return '';}).join('')+'
CriterionMarksMet?
'+x.c+''+x.m+'
';document.getElementById('pa-sub').onclick=function(){var done=cr.filter(function(_,i){return document.getElementById('pa-'+i).value!=='';}).length;var imp=document.getElementById('pa-imp').value.trim();var fb=document.getElementById('pa-fb');if(done>=4&&imp.length>5){fb.className='ex-feedback ok';fb.textContent='Peer assessment complete. Good feedback helps your partner!';__markStepComplete();}else{fb.className='ex-feedback hint';fb.textContent='Please rate all criteria and add one improvement suggestion.';};};}())

quizQuestions.q: Which block makes a sprite's score go down by 1?
Which block animates a sprite by switching between its appearances?
What is the best reason to plan your game before building it?
options: A clear plan makes building easier and reduces mistakes
Planning writes the code for you

quizQuestions.q: Which script lets a sprite move in four directions using arrow keys?
options:
when green flag clicked
move (10) steps

when green flag clicked
forever
  if <key [right arrow v] pressed?> then
    change x by (5)
  end
  if <key [left arrow v] pressed?> then
    change x by (-5)
  end
  if <key [up arrow v] pressed?> then
    change y by (5)
  end
  if <key [down arrow v] pressed?> then
    change y by (-5)
  end
end

when green flag clicked
repeat (4)
  change x by (5)
end

when [right arrow v] key pressed
forever
  move (10) steps
end

quizQuestions.q: Build a script where the score starts at 0 when the flag is clicked, goes up by 1 when the up arrow is pressed, and goes down by 1 when the down arrow is pressed.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer:
when green flag clicked
set [score v] to (0)

when [up arrow v] key pressed
change [score v] by (1)

when [down arrow v] key pressed
change [score v] by (-1)

quizQuestions.q: Build a sprite that moves up and down using the up and down arrow keys inside a forever loop.
quizQuestions.sampleAnswer:
when green flag clicked
forever
  if <key [up arrow v] pressed?> then
    change y by (10)
  end
  if <key [down arrow v] pressed?> then
    change y by (-10)
  end
end
